description: Background removal integration -- rembg as Python subprocess from Node.js, chroma key alternative via Sharp, per-slot-type strategy (apply removal to subject and near_fg only; far_bg and mid_bg don't need it). Addresses OQ-02 (best strategy for images without alpha) and TC-12 (rembg viable as subprocess -- under 5 seconds per image, acceptable mask quality).
notes: Tier 4 integration. Medium priority. Covers TC-12. Part of asset pipeline, not rendering engine (per AP-04).
